title: A Storm During the Flight
content: Halfway through the flight, dark clouds appeared outside the airplane window. Soon afterward, turbulence caused the aircraft to shake noticeably. Some passengers looked nervous, while others remained calm and continued reading or sleeping. Marcus felt uneasy but listened carefully to the pilot’s reassuring announcements. The cabin crew moved through the aisle checking seatbelts and answering questions. After about twenty minutes, the plane left the storm behind and the flight became smooth again. Although the experience was stressful, Marcus felt relieved and impressed by how professionally the crew handled the situation.
